Pivot $741.35 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Strong Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $703.38 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: TSLA PUT — enter $15.65–$17.29, target $24.70+, stop $9.88.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -0.85% and SPY -0.85%. Composite sentiment -60 (Strong Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by market breadth (a/d), spy trend, qqq / mega-cap tech. VIX at 17.04 (+4.07%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Energy (+1.07%) is leading while Industrials (-3.26%) lags. Premarket strength in AVGO, XOM; weakness in PLTR, COIN. The desk's highest-conviction setup is TSLA (7.0/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
